name: Smono 4 Vaporizer
summary: A budget convection vaporiser for dry herb and concentrates, with eight preset temperatures.
description: The Smono 4 uses convection heating and offers eight presets from 160°C up to 230°C, so you can step the temperature to suit flavour or density. It handles both dry herb and concentrates, has adjustable airflow, and gets 8–10 sessions from a 2300mAh battery. The full accessory kit, including cleaning tools and a USB cable, comes in the box, which is more than many cheap devices include. It suits a patient new to vaporising, or anyone wanting a reliable, inexpensive backup. At this price the build is basic, but the convection heating and preset range give it more flexibility than the cost suggests.
